libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No environment variables or system properties are required. Generated or repaired tests should target the 2.38.0 public API: org.apache.activemq.artemis.utils.Base64 no longer exposes DONT_BREAK_LINES or decodeToObject(String); use encodeObject(Serializable), encodeBytes/decode, or deserialize from Base64.decode(...) if object round-trip coverage is needed.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8665 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.activemq:artemis-commons:2.38.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests copied from older versions may fail javac because of removed Base64 API members.
Some upstream Artemis tests use artemis-unit-test-support, but it is not required for meaningful TCK coverage of artemis-commons utilities.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: org.apache.activemq:artemis-commons:2.38.0 is a utility/common library whose required runtime dependencies are already resolved transitively from the artifact POM; meaningful tests can exercise its public utilities without extra Maven dependencies, Docker services, or environment setup.
